overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a group of people gathered around a bonfire at night on a rooftop or overlook, with futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue night sky and city glow.

Arasaka corporate logo illuminates on the distant tower, changing from dark to bright cyan

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a nighttime campfire gathering on a rooftop overlooking a futuristic city. Several people sit and stand around the central bonfire while the neon-lit skyline of Night City rises in the background. At around 14 seconds, the Arasaka logo illuminates on the distant tower, and one person on the right celebrates by raising their arms.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric moment of a nighttime gathering that culminates in a sudden burst of corporate illumination over a futuristic skyline. It begins with a wide view of a rooftop campfire, where several people are huddled around the flickering flames against the cool glow of the city. As the group remains gathered in the moody light, the distant horizon shifts when the Arasaka logo suddenly illuminates atop a towering skyscraper. This flash of light triggers a reaction in the crowd, with one person on the right raising their arms in celebration before the scene settles back into the contrast of warm firelight and neon blue.
